original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Chapter 10: Guidelines for the Provision of Paediatric Anaesthesia Services 2025
original_registry_entry.population: Infants, children, and young people aged under 19 years receiving anesthesia or anesthesia-service sedation.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Paediatric preassessment, anesthesia, recovery, information, governance, and networked perioperative care.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for age, complexity, comorbidity, supervision, preassessment, anesthetist assessment, child and parent involvement, age-appropriate information, and immediate recovery observation. It does not generate a technique, medicine, dose, transfer, or treatment plan, and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.5-1.6 and 2.7 - supervision, immediate recovery, and preassessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting age, complexity, comorbidity, supervision context, immediate postanesthesia airway-management status, and completed paediatric preassessment.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendation 5.11 and section 9 - anesthetist assessment, questions, involvement, and information
exact_sections.locator: official chapter recommendation 5.11 and patient-information section 9
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting anesthetist assessment, child and parent or carer questions, involvement, physical and psychological preparation, and age-appropriate information without generating care decisions.

title: Chapter 10: Guidelines for the Provision of Paediatric Anaesthesia Services 2025
population: Infants, children, and young people aged under 19 years receiving anesthesia or anesthesia-service sedation.
intended_setting: Paediatric preassessment, anesthesia, recovery, information, governance, and networked perioperative care.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
